# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-sql-server"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-app-db"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "developmentIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        {
          "name": "DevIP1",
          "startIpAddress": "203.0.113.10",
          "endIpAddress": "203.0.113.10"
        },
        {
          "name": "DevIP2",
          "startIpAddress": "203.0.113.11",
          "endIpAddress": "203.0.113.11"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {},
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "sqladmin",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "AzureSQL2024!",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
          "name": "AllowAllWindowsAzureIps",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "copy": {
            "name": "devFirewallRules",
            "count": "[length(parameters('developmentIpRanges'))]"
          },
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
          "name": "[parameters('developmentIpRanges')[copyIndex('devFirewallRules')].name]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIpRanges')[copyIndex('devFirewallRules')].startIpAddress]",
            "endIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIpRanges')[copyIndex('devFirewallRules')].endIpAddress]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "Basic",
        "tier": "Basic",
        "capacity": 5
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648,
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
